meta.title: Digital vehicle maintenance logbook
meta.description: Track fuel, services, reminders and expenses in one place. Built for drivers who want clarity without spreadsheets.

hero.headline: Your vehicle history, finally in one place.
hero.sub: Record services, fuel and expenses with reminders that help you avoid costly surprises.
hero.placeholderBody: Pending asset: add a generated homepage hero to media/generated/ (task 0021 image workflow), then integrate it here.
hero.imageAlt: Product illustration: desktop dashboard and phone app for vehicles, expenses, and maintenance reminders.

items.title: Multi-vehicle support
items.detail: Daily driver, weekend project, or a few cars in the family — each one keeps its own story straight.

items.title: Reminders that actually help
items.detail: Service, registration, insurance — gentle nudges before a deadline becomes an expensive surprise.

items.title: Fuel & costs in one rhythm
items.detail: Fill-ups and expenses build a clear picture without spreadsheet acrobatics.

items.title: Your data, your rules
items.detail: A tool that respects you: clear privacy choices and policies written for humans.

problem.title: From scattered notes to a clear record
problem.problemBody: Receipts, notebooks and spreadsheets fall out of sync. You lose history when you sell the car—or when you simply forget what was done.
problem.solutionBody: A structured service log that stays with your account: add events in seconds, attach context, and get reminders before deadlines slip.
problem.imageAlt: Illustration: messy receipts and notes versus an organized mobile app with service history and fuel costs.

how.title: How it works
how.lead: Three straightforward steps—pick up your phone after a service stop or fill-up, and you’re done in a moment.

steps.title: Create your profile
steps.body: Sign up and add one or more vehicles with the basics you already know—brand, model, plate, odometer, whatever helps you stay oriented.
steps.tip: You can always edit details later; start simple so the habit sticks.

steps.title: Log what matters
steps.body: Record fuel, maintenance, repairs, tolls, insurance—costs and mileage as life happens, from desktop or phone.
steps.tip: Quick entries right after the workshop or gas station beat “I’ll do it tonight” every time.

steps.title: Stay ahead
steps.body: Turn on reminders for minor and major services, registration, vignette, casco—whatever you don’t want to chase at the last minute.
steps.tip: Nudges are there to help, not nag—we keep them practical and easy to adjust.

items.title: Service history
items.body: Keep a timeline of maintenance and repairs with notes and files when you need them.

items.title: Fuel & consumption
items.body: Track fills and trends so you can spot changes early.

items.title: Costs in one view
items.body: See expenses across categories instead of hunting through messages and PDFs.

items.title: Handoff-friendly
items.body: When you sell, your record can travel with the vehicle—clean and complete.

showcase.title: Inside the app
showcase.body: The current web experience is optimized for fast entry on desktop and phone—same account, consistent data.
showcase.wideAlt: RideLogger web app dashboard on a wide screen
showcase.narrowAlt: RideLogger web app on a narrow mobile viewport

security.title: Your data, your ownership
security.body: We treat account and vehicle data with care: modern transport security, access controls, and clear policies. Read the Privacy Policy for details on categories, purposes and your rights.
security.imageAlt: Illustration: documents and user data protected by a shield and padlock, with subtle cloud and network cues.

items.quote: Paper notes and Excel files couldn’t keep up with my work pace. Now everything is in one place and always available.
items.author: Miloš, HR manager

items.quote: Reminders changed everything—small service, big service, vignette, casco. The app nudges me before I miss a date.
items.author: Tijana, IT engineer

items.quote: I track a restoration project as a hobby. It’s much easier to review costs and work done so far.
items.author: Momčilo, designer

items.quote: Simple, transparent, and it fits how I like to stay organized—at least when it comes to the car.
items.author: Jovana, sales manager

cta.title: Start in minutes
cta.body: Use the web app on the device you already have—no install required to begin.

footer.tagline: Vehicle maintenance logbook for people who drive for real.
footer.note: Product names and availability may evolve; the web app remains the primary entry point.
